creator: Herbert Booker
description: NOTA BENE: This is not meant to glorify the Confederate States of America, but, African-Americans served on both sides in the U.S. Civil War, believe it or not? Not only African-Americans, but Native American Indians also served in the confederate and union armies and navies. Here are photographs taken during the years 1861 to 1865 and up to 1923, possibly to 1940?
